Text: Actually looking at pm4pys DECLARE representation For unary templates Existence Absence ExactlyOne Init the dictionary maps activity to support float confidence float For binary templates Response Precedence etc the dictionary usually maps activity a activity b to support float confidence float

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
